violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. -Hand wash sink is not accessible. Did not observe handwashing during inspection.

Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Raw animal food was not properly separated from raw or cooked ready-to-eat food. -Raw beef sitting above ready to eat food in refrigerator.
Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not designed and/or maintained properly. -Need to have filters on venthood.

Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. -Sink was blocked by supplies and basin had supplies in it.
Food display and service. — --Potentially hazardous food was not kept at an internal temperature of 41F or below during display or service. -Raw chicken sitting out at 54F.
Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. -Fridge was at 45F
Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided. -Need for quat sanitizer.
